/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/ui/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/ui/status_bar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/core/flasher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/core/adb_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/core/fastboot_helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/utils/thread_worker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/flasher.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o -o flasher  -lgtkmm-3.0 -latkmm-1.6 -lgdkmm-3.0 -lgiomm-2.4 -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -latk-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgio-2.0 -lpangomm-1.4 -lglibmm-2.4 -lcairomm-1.0 -lsigc-2.0 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lcairo -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lpthread
